_meta.cpu: AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 5955WX (16 cores / 32 threads)
_meta.bench: llama-bench -p 512 -n 64 (prefill/decode tok/s); llama-perplexity wikitext-2-raw test, 16 chunks, n_ctx 512
_meta.pod: RunPod community A5000 (CPU used; GPU idle), $0.16/hr, ~53 min total
_meta.honest_note: 1.7B is sasori's WORST case: FP embeddings dominate the file at small scale (TQ3P weights are 6.19 bpw but the FILE is 9.2 bpw). Perplexity != task accuracy (the Papers B/C theme). TQ2P collapse cross-validates Paper C's small-model cliff (not a kernel bug: TQ3P works, PPL finite).
